name: Asuka Hirama
description: One of the girls who came to cheer for Aoba Johsai, especially Oikawa, during the Interhigh Preliminary match against Karasuno. Throughout the match, she shows that she isn't too familiar with the rules and plays of volleyball and relies on [Takinoue](https://anilist.co/character/80511/Yuusuke-Takinoue) and [Shimada](https://anilist.co/character/80513/Makoto-Shimada) to explain things to her. She would later appear during Seijoh's rematch against Karasuno.
